display_information.name: slop-chop
display_information.description: Chop AI slop from your messages, deterministically.
display_information.long_description: Runs the slop-chop rules engine over your text and hands back the cleaned version with a before and after slop score. Deterministic word, phrase, and punctuation rules; no model, no storage. Replies are ephemeral, so only you see them. Use the /chop command with any text, or the Chop this message shortcut on an existing message.

shortcuts.name: Chop this message
shortcuts.description: Chop the slop from this message and show you the result
